title: [v4.0-rhel] RHEL-17145: Update to github.com/klauspost/pgzip@v1.2.6
body:
... to fix a bug which shows up with Go >= 1.19:
https://github.com/klauspost/pgzip/pull/50

A WIP/proof of concept for https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-15029 .

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fixed creating compressed archives when compiled with Go ≥ 1.19.
```
